column2: Plate which will store and connect all components
Large servo rail capacitor to reduce voltage dips during servo movement.
Power input terminals for logic and servo power connections.
3-pin servo headers for servo power, ground, and PWM signal.
UART programming header for flashing and debugging the ESP32.
Bulk/decoupling capacitors for the stable 3.3 V regulator input/output and logic power.
I2C pull-up resistors for SDA and SCL lines.
Pull-up/pull-down resistors for ESP32 boot/reset and sensor address configuration.
Main microcontroller module for sensor reading, servo control, and wireless debugging.
IMU sensor for acceleration and angular velocity measurement during rocket flight.
Barometric pressure sensor for altitude and pressure measurement.
Decoupling capacitors for the ESP32, MPU6050, BMP280, and power rail noise filtering.
3.3 V voltage regulator for the ESP32 and sensors.
Reset and boot tactile buttons for programming and manual restart.
